title: Server API — GET /api/presentations with live directory scan
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/presentations returns JSON matching the current manifest shape exactly
Live directory scan of html/year10 at request time (not build-time)
Malformed metadata skipped with console.warn, never crashes
Response includes $schema, generated, count, presentations array
Each presentation entry includes id, href, filePath, addedAt fields
completion_summary: Created Express router with live html/year10 scan, @presentation metadata extraction, and manifest JSON response matching static schema.
